message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #888888
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F0
  ArrowColor #000000
}

participant "beerocks_cli" as beerocks_cli
participant "bml_internal" as bml_internal
participant "controller" as controller
participant "controller_db" as controller_db

beerocks_cli -> beerocks_cli : beerocks_cli -c\n"bml_clear_wifi_credentials <al-mac>"
activate beerocks_cli
beerocks_cli -> beerocks_cli : cli_bml::clear_wifi_credentials_caller(args)
beerocks_cli -> beerocks_cli : cli_bml::clear_wifi_credentials(\nargs.stringArgs[0])
beerocks_cli -> beerocks_cli : bml_clear_wifi_credentials(\nctx,\nal-mac.c_str())
beerocks_cli -> bml_internal : clear_wifi_credentials(\nconst sMacAddr &al_mac)
activate bml_internal

bml_internal -> controller : message_com::send_cmdu(\nm_sockMaster,\nACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_REQUEST)
activate controller

controller -> controller_db : clear_bss_info_configuration(\nconst sMacAddr &al_mac)
activate controller_db
deactivate controller_db

controller -> bml_internal : message_com::send_cmdu(\nm_sockMaster,\nACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_RESPONSE)
deactivate controller
deactivate bml_internal
deactivate beerocks_cli
@enduml
